title: rhus radicans var. pubescens
intro: Rhus radicans var. pubescens, also known as Smooth American Poison Ivy, is a type of flowering plant in the Anacardiaceae family that is native to eastern North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Smooth American Poison Ivy include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating conditions such as eczema, acne, and arthritis. Smooth American Poison Ivy can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, tinctures, or salves, and is often used to create topical creams and ointments that can be applied directly to affected areas.
